title: BLDP 2024-2025 Analyst Consensus and Market Outlook
text: According to analyst consensus as of May 2026, BLDP has a Hold consensus rating from 7 analysts. Analyst breakdown shows 14% recommending Strong Buy, 0% Buy, 57% Hold, 29% Sell, and 0% Strong Sell. Wall Street analysts have set a price target of $2.99, reflecting flat expectations from current stock price. The overall outlook for Ballard Power Systems is challenging due to ongoing financial difficulties, including expected negative earnings per share (EPS), free cash flow, and EBITDA for several years. Revenue estimates for FY 2025 and 2026 have been reduced by 12% and 15%, respectively. Wall Street analysts forecast BLDP stock price to fall over the next 12 months, with average 1-year price target of 1.61 USD (low 1.00 USD, high 2.00 USD). Lake Street downgraded BLDP to Hold from Buy with a price target of $2, down from $5. While encouraged by new management's goal of cash flow breakeven exiting 2027, the hydrogen fuel cell market remains challenging with mixed order activity and headwinds in several markets, prompting the downgrade pending clarity on the company's roadmap.
